hooks.template: This represents your X before, during, and after X
hooks.text: This is a business owner's sourcing budget before the bank, during the wire, and after.

hooks.template: This is why doing (insert action) makes you (insert pain point).
hooks.text: This is why wiring to China through your bank quietly costs you 10,000 dollars a year.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner opened his books and noticed something strange in every China wire.

hooks.template: (insert big result) from (insert item/thing). Here's how you can do it in X steps.
hooks.text: 10,000 dollars a year, hiding in one exchange rate. Here is how a business owner finds it.

hooks.template: I do not believe in (insert common belief), I believe in (insert your belief).
hooks.text: Most business owners think the wire fee is the cost. The real cost is the rate.
